scope.matching: exact neutral-family and UTF-8 byte span
scope.selection_note: All corpus cases whose expected spans use only predeclared shared detector families; negative cases are included by the same rule. This project-owned corpus is not an independent benchmark.
scope.selection_rule: include a case when every expected entity type is in included_expected_entity_types

configuration.features: redact-cli default pattern registry; no NER recognizer registered
configuration.threshold: native pattern-registry minimum 0.5; no CLI threshold override
